findings.title: README.md target operational date is past and milestone was not met
findings.detail: README.md line 7 states 'Target operational date: end of Day 5 (2026-05-20)'. SPRINT.md explicitly documents SPRINT-2026-05-A as incomplete with zero feature commits. The document presents a missed target as current.
findings.fix_sketch: Update to reflect current status and revised target.

findings.title: SECURITY.md Protected Paths missing ROADMAP.md and DECISIONS.md
findings.detail: SECURITY.md protects ARCHITECTURE.md, NON_GOALS.md, STAKEHOLDERS.md, and ADRs, but not ROADMAP.md (whose [M-NNN] format is parsed by Decomposer) or DECISIONS.md (the ADR index). Unauthorized edits to these could silently break parsing or hide ADR decisions.
findings.fix_sketch: Add ROADMAP.md and DECISIONS.md to Protected Paths in SECURITY.md.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md declares itself auto-generated but is manually maintained with no enforcement
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md line 6 says 'Auto-generated by CI from docs/decisions/*.md (generator not yet wired — manually maintained until M-002+ ships)'. Without a pre-commit hook, DECISIONS.md will drift from the actual ADR files as new ADRs are added without updating the index.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a pre-commit hook that validates DECISIONS.md is in sync with docs/decisions/*.md frontmatter, or update the file to clearly state it is manual until M-002.

findings.title: KPI.md OKR due dates are stale after SPRINT-2026-05-A failure
findings.detail: KPI.md defines Q2 OKRs with due dates (KR1: 2026-05-20, KR2: 2026-05-27). KR1 failed because SPRINT-2026-05-A was incomplete. OKRs now contain missed targets with no post-mortem or revision noted.
findings.fix_sketch: Update KPI.md to document KR1 as failed and revise KR2-KR4 due dates accordingly.

findings.title: INTEGRATIONS.md n8n status page is TBD with no health-check runbook
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md line 138 lists n8n status page as 'TBD if set up'. n8n handles critical Retell→Supabase webhook processing. No alert/detection mechanism is documented if n8n goes down.
findings.fix_sketch: Before M-005 launch: configure n8n monitoring, add n8n-down scenario to RUNBOOK.md, and update INTEGRATIONS.md with confirmed status URL.

findings.title: External memory links (~~[[...]]~~) reference files not in version control
findings.detail: STAKEHOLDERS.md and multiple ADRs reference [[ifleet-repo]], [[project-status-20260513]], [[searxng-mcp]] as memory links that only exist in a local ~/.claude/projects/ directory. Critical decisions cite sources inaccessible to other team members or in CI.
findings.fix_sketch: Create memory/ folder with decision-context.md summarizing key referenced context, or inline the summaries directly in the ADRs.

findings.title: RUNBOOK.md references undefined terms Rule of Two, SLO, SLI without definitions
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md lines 73-74 reference 'Rule of two' and SLO/SLI throughout, but these terms are not defined in KPI.md, RUNBOOK.md, or UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md, making the runbook harder to follow for team members unfamiliar with the conventions.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a 'Definitions' section to RUNBOOK.md defining Rule of two, SLO, and SLI, or add them to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.

findings.title: Inconsistent voice agent terminology across spec files
findings.detail: Files use 'voice interviewer', 'voice agent', 'voice-discovery agent' interchangeably. UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md defines only 'voice-discovery' (repo name) but not the canonical name for the AI running inside it.
findings.fix_sketch: Add 'Voice Interviewer Agent' definition to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md: the AI-driven interview agent inside voice-discovery, powered by Retell AI.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md Unreleased section has no structured Added/Changed/Removed entries
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md defines SemVer rules but the [Unreleased] section contains only a single Changed entry without the full structure. No version has been released but the placeholder format is inconsistent with Keep a Changelog spec.
findings.fix_sketch: Add note: 'Initial release planned after SPRINT-2026-05-B.' Populate proper Added/Changed/Removed structure when M-001 ships.

findings.title: ADR-0001 verification steps marked accepted without evidence of verification
findings.detail: ADR-0001 line 60 documents that 'Claude Code session reads AGENTS.md' should be verified, but the ADR is marked 'accepted' with no confirmation that the verification was completed.
findings.fix_sketch: Update ADR-0001 Confirmation section with verification date and outcome, or note it as pending verification.
